description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized city bus with a predominantly white exterior and large, tinted side windows that run nearly the full length of the vehicle. The bus features two wide passenger entry/exit doors on the right side, each with clear glass panels, and a set of six rectangular windows separated by slim vertical pillars. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, two yellow-tinted headlights, and a digital route display above the windshield. The rear of the bus includes a large window, red taillights, and a digital display panel. The bus sits on two axles with four wheels, and the overall design is streamlined and functional for urban passenger transport.
description: A white, modern city bus with large tinted windows, two passenger doors, and digital display panels at the front and rear. The bus is designed for urban public transportation and features a sleek, streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the right side of the bus with two passenger doors and six large windows.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide windshield, yellow headlights, and a digital route display above the windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with six large windows and no visible passenger doors.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large window, red taillights, and a digital display panel above the window.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large, rectangular, evenly spaced windows along each side, separated by slim vertical pillars, with the windows extending nearly the full height between the lower body and the roofline.
